violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Staff informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Ice was observed in the handwashing sink behind the breakfast bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The mop sink was observed in poor repair (only on 2 legs). Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
The flooring throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue. The floors surrounding floor drains were observed with stagnant water. Apparent foul smell was present during time of inspection. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Opening observed by AC unit under warewashing dish table. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Walk-in freezer wall missing panel (styrofoam insulation exposed) was observed missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets of the walk-in coolers observed in poor repair. The mop sink observed in poor repair as well (only on 2 legs). Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The flooring throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the prep/cook/grill area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The facility is lacking sanitizer for the dishwasher and 3-bay sink in the kitchen. Sanitizer must be available at all times at the proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Ambient temperature of 2-door reach-in #1 (near cook/grill line) observed at 86 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The cutting boards of the 3 prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets of the walk-in coolers observed in poor repair. The mop sink observed in poor repair as well (only on 2 legs). In addition, prep units #2 and #3 observed with water on the bottom shelves. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The flooring throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in prep/cook/grill area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
